data: Confidential Assistant, Department of Health & Human Services
Maynard, Esther - --2025 DHHS POLITICAL APPOINTEES (NON PAS)  - New Entrant - 278 - 2025 - 2025-02-27
Filer and a friend collaborated on bets through Caesars Sports Book and Barstool Sports and divided the winnings.
Filer received a stipend for canvassing for President Trump in Bucks County, PA, coordinated through American Values PAC and paid by Freedom for America Fund.
Only A Lot (print literary and photography periodical), Dublin Mist Press (value not readily ascertainable)

Filer and her sister co-created Only A Lot, a print literary and art periodical. Over four years, 2020-2024, Filer and her sister released four issues, the last of which was Spring of 2024.  The periodical is now dormant, and Filer does not intend to restart it.

If permitted, pursuant to the outside activity approval process, Filer will continue working for Camp Highroad, consulting as the camp hires a new Director of Operations and working as weekend staff as her schedule allows. (2025-03-01)

As Hospitality Manager and then Director of Operations, filer managed incoming groups and coordinated their schedules.  Filer oversaw maintenance, hospitality, catering and programs at the faith-centered campgrounds.
